title: Bridge Essay: N,N-dimethyltryptamine and Amazonian ayahuasca plant medicine.
concept: Psychedelic decoupling — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states of consciousness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nonordinary — psychedelic decoupling, ego dissolution, DMN disruption, altered states.
**Phase context:** Psychedelic decoupling — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states of consciousness.

**N,N-dimethyltryptamine and Amazonian ayahuasca plant medicine.** — Hum Psychopharmacol (2022). DOI: 10.1002/hup.2835. PMID: 35175662. OBJECTIVE: Reports have indicated possible uses of ayahuasca for the treatment of conditions including depression, addictions, post-traumatic stress disorder, anxiety and specific psychoneuroendocrine immune system pathologies. The article assesses potential ayahuasca and N,N-dimethyltryptamine (DMT) integration with contemporary healthcare.
